lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਸਉ ਲੋਚੈ ਰੰਗੁ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: je sau lochai rang na hovai koe |3|
lines.english: Even if he wishes it a hundred times, he does not obtain the Lord's Love. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥੪॥੨॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak har ras har rang samaavai |4|2|6|
lines.english: Nanak is absorbed into the subtle essence of the Lord's Love. ||4||2||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਤਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: nadar kare taa satigur paavai |
lines.english: But if the Lord blesses him with His Glance of Grace, then he meets the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹਵਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਰਹੀ ਅਘਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jihavaa har ras rahee aghaae |
lines.english: My tongue remains satisfied with the subtle essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਜਨ ਚਾਖਹੁ ਜੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har ras jan chaakhahu je bhaaee |
lines.english: If you taste the subtle essence of the Lord, O humble Siblings of Destiny,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੀਵੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh peevai sehaj samaae |1|
lines.english: The Gurmukh drinks it in, and merges in celestial peace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਕਤ ਅਨਤ ਸਾਦਿ ਲੋਭਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tau kat anat saad lobhaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: then how can you be enticed by other flavors? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਰਸੁ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramat ras raakhahu ur dhaar |
lines.english: Under Guru's Instructions, keep this subtle essence enshrined in your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰੈ ਬਹੁਤੀ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਜਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: haumai karai bahutee milai sajaae |3|
lines.english: He acts out in ego, and suffers terrible punishment. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਰੰਗਿ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har ras raate rang muraar |2|
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the subtle essence of the Lord, are immersed in celestial bliss. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh har ras chaakhiaa na jaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh cannot even taste the subtle essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: nadar kare taa har ras paavai |
lines.english: But if he is blessed with the Lord's Kind Mercy, then he obtains the subtle essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ॥੪॥੩॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak har ras har gun gaavai |4|3|7|
lines.english: O Nanak, absorbed in this subtle essence of the Lord, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||4||3||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਘਰੁ ੬ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 4 ghar 6 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fourth Mehl, Sixth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਛਹੁ ਬਿਦਰ ਦਾਸੀ ਸੁਤੈ ਕਿਸਨੁ ਉਤਰਿਆ ਘਰਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: poochhahu bidar daasee sutai kisan utariaa ghar jis jaae |1|
lines.english: Go and ask Bidar, the son of a maid; Krishna himself stayed in his house. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਚ ਜਾਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਤਿਆ ਉਤਮ ਪਦਵੀ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: neech jaat har japatiaa utam padavee paae |
lines.english: When someone of low social class chants the Lord's Name, he obtains the state of highest dignity.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਅਕਥ ਕਥਾ ਸੁਨਹੁ ਜਨ ਭਾਈ ਜਿਤੁ ਸਹਸਾ ਦੂਖ ਭੂਖ ਸਭ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har kee akath kathaa sunahu jan bhaaee jit sahasaa dookh bhookh sabh leh jaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Listen, O humble Siblings of Destiny, to the Unspoken Speech of the Lord; it removes all anxiety, pain and hunger. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਜਾਤਿ ਉਤਮੁ ਭਇਆ ਚਾਰਿ ਵਰਨ ਪਏ ਪਗਿ ਆਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: patit jaat utam bheaa chaar varan pe pag aae |2|
lines.english: Although he was of low social status, he was exalted and elevated, and people of all four castes came and bowed at his feet. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿਦਾਸੁ ਚਮਾਰੁ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਨਿਮਖ ਇਕ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ravidaas chamaar usatat kare har keerat nimakh ik gaae |
lines.english: Ravi Daas, the leather-worker, praised the Lord, and sang the Kirtan of His Praises each and every instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਦੇਅ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗੀ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਲੋਕੁ ਛੀਪਾ ਕਹੈ ਬੁਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naamadea preet lagee har setee lok chheepaa kahai bulaae |
lines.english: Naam Dayv loved the Lord; the people called him a fabric dyer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਤ੍ਰੀ ਬ੍ਰਾਹਮਣ ਪਿਠਿ ਦੇ ਛੋਡੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਦੇਉ ਲੀਆ ਮੁਖਿ ਲਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: khatree braahaman pitth de chhodde har naamadeo leea mukh laae |3|
lines.english: The Lord turned His back on the high-class Kh'shaatriyas and Brahmins, and showed His face to Naam Dayv. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤਨੇ ਭਗਤ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਕਾ ਮੁਖਿ ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਤਿਨ ਤਿਲਕੁ ਕਢਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jitane bhagat har sevakaa mukh atthasatth teerath tin tilak kadtaae |
lines.english: All of the devotees and servants of the Lord have the tilak, the ceremonial mark, applied to their foreheads at the sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਪਰਸੇ ਜੇ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇ ॥੪॥੧॥੮॥
lines.translit: jan naanak tin kau anadin parase je kripaa kare har raae |4|1|8|
lines.english: Servant Nanak shall touch their feet night and day, if the Lord, the King, grants His Grace. ||4||1||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਬਖੀਲੀ ਕੋਈ ਕਿਆ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਨ ਕਾ ਅੰਗੁ ਕਰੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਹਰਿ ਕਰਤਾਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tin kee bakheelee koee kiaa kare jin kaa ang kare meraa har karataaraa |1|
lines.english: What can anyone do to undermine them? My Creator Lord is on their side. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨੑੀ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਰਾਧਿਆ ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਲਿਖਤੁ ਲਿਲਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: tinaee antar har aaraadhiaa jin kau dhur likhiaa likhat lilaaraa |
lines.english: They alone worship and adore the Lord deep within, who are blessed with such pre-ordained destiny from the very beginning of time.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਧਿਆਇ ਹਰਿ ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਸਭਿ ਦੂਖ ਨਿਵਾਰਣਹਾਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har dhiaae man mere man dhiaae har janam janam ke sabh dookh nivaaranahaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: So meditate on the Lord, Har, Har, O my mind. Meditate on the Lord, O mind; He is the Eliminator of all the pains of reincarnation. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਕਉ ਬਖਸਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਭਗਤਿ ਭੰਡਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: dhur bhagat janaa kau bakhasiaa har amrit bhagat bhanddaaraa |
lines.english: In the very beginning, the Lord blessed His devotees with the Ambrosial Nectar, the treasure of devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਭਗਤ ਸੇ ਸੇਵਕਾ ਜਿਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: se bhagat se sevakaa jinaa har naam piaaraa |
lines.english: They alone are devotees, and they alone are selfless servants, who love the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਰਖੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਉਨ ਕੀ ਰੀਸ ਕਰੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਹਲਤਿ ਪਲਤਿ ਮੁਹੁ ਕਾਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: moorakh hovai su un kee rees kare tis halat palat muhu kaaraa |2|
lines.english: Anyone who tries to compete with them is a fool; his face shall be blackened here and hereafter. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਿਰਿ ਨਿੰਦਕ ਕੈ ਪਵੈ ਛਾਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tin kee sevaa te har paaeeai sir nindak kai pavai chhaaraa |3|
lines.english: By their selfless service, they find the Lord, while ashes fall on the heads of the slanderers. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਘਰਿ ਵਿਰਤੀ ਸੋਈ ਜਾਣੈ ਜਗਤ ਗੁਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਛਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis ghar viratee soee jaanai jagat gur naanak poochh karahu beechaaraa |
lines.english: He alone knows this, who experiences it within the home of his own self. Ask Guru Nanak, the Guru of the world, and reflect upon it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਹੁ ਪੀੜੀ ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਬਖੀਲੀ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਕ ਭਾਇ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ॥੪॥੨॥੯॥
lines.translit: chahu peerree aad jugaad bakheelee kinai na paaeo har sevak bhaae nisataaraa |4|2|9|
lines.english: Throughout the four generations of the Gurus, from the beginning of time and throughout the ages, no one has ever found the Lord by back-biting and undermining. Only by serving the Lord with love, is one emancipated. ||4||2||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਹਰਿ ਆਰਾਧੀਐ ਤਿਥੈ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਤੁ ਸਹਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jithai har aaraadheeai tithai har mit sahaaee |
lines.english: Wherever the Lord is worshipped in adoration, there the Lord becomes one's friend and helper.
